headline: Pure Actions, True Joy
takeaway: Pure actions are selfless, without attachment or desire for results, leading to true happiness.
content_excerpt:
Bhagavad Gita · Chapter 18 · Verse 23

नियतं सङ्गरहितमरागद्वेषतः कृतम्।अफलप्रेप्सुना कर्म यत्तत्सात्त्विकमुच्यते।।18.23।।

An obligatory action performed without attachment, without love or hatred, and without desire for its fruits is known to be Pure.

In this verse, I find a be

headline: सेवा में समानता
takeaway: इंद्रियों को वश में करके, सभी प्राणियों के कल्याण के लिए कार्य करते हैं।
content_excerpt:
Bhagavad Gita · Chapter 12 · Verse 4

संनियम्येन्द्रियग्रामं सर्वत्र समबुद्धयः।ते प्राप्नुवन्ति मामेव सर्वभूतहिते रताः।।12.4।।

By subduing their senses and viewing all situations with an even mind, those who are dedicated to the welfare of all beings will surely come to Me.

In

headline: Sacrifice Without Expectation
takeaway: True acts of devotion are done selflessly, without seeking rewards or recognition.
content_excerpt:
Bhagavad Gita · Chapter 17 · Verse 25

तदित्यनभिसन्धाय फलं यज्ञतपःक्रियाः।

दानक्रियाश्च विविधाः क्रियन्ते मोक्षकाङ्क्षिभि:।।17.25।。

Those who seek liberation perform actions of sacrifice, austerity, and charity with the word 'Tat' in their hearts, without aiming for any reward.

headline: क्षमा की प्रार्थना
takeaway: जो भी अपमान मैंने किया, उसकी क्षमा चाहता हूँ, हे अद्वितीय भगवान!
content_excerpt:
Bhagavad Gita · Chapter 11 · Verse 42

यच्चावहासार्थमसत्कृतोऽसि

विहारशय्यासनभोजनेषु।

एकोऽथवाप्यच्युत तत्समक्षं

तत्क्षामये त्वामहमप्रमेयम्।।11.42।।
